goal: Fix deck-unlock hint copy that says 'streak' while the mechanic is forgiving accumulated daily reads
done: profileDeckLockedHint (EN+TH) said 'keep your streak going / รักษาสตรีค' but canUnlockDeck unlocks by total_daily_reads >= unlock_day (accumulated, missing a day never resets; user decision 2026-06-18). Rewrote to EN 'Unlocks after {day} daily readings — miss a day, no setback' / TH 'ปลดล็อกเมื่อเปิดไพ่รายวันครบ {day} วัน (ขาดวันได้ ไม่รีเซ็ต)'. Note: meow-coin.svg is an unused asset — there is no coin currency; unlocking is the daily-reads system.
root_cause: Copy never updated after the 2026-06-18 switch from consecutive-streak to forgiving accumulated daily-reads unlock.
fix: Reworded the locked-deck hint in both locales to match the forgiving mechanic.
